name: Thirty Flights of Loving
short_description: This surprising first-person story tells the tale of a heist gone wrong. Encounter high-flying schemers, lovelorn criminals, and more stray kittens than you can shake a stick at.
detailed_description:
Explore the world of Thirty Flights of Loving in this first-person short story. Encounter high-flying schemers, lovelorn criminals, and more stray kittens than you can shake a stick at. Saddle up, gunslinger.

WHAT'S INCLUDED

  • Thirty Flights of Loving, a 20-minute first-person short story.

  • Gravity Bone, a 20-minute prequel to Thirty Flights of Loving.

  • Developer commentary for Thirty Flights of Loving.

  • Featuring an original soundtrack by Chris Remo.

RECOGNITION

🏆 Independent Games Festival Excellence in Narrative award (nominee)

🏆 Independent Games Festival Seumas McNally Grand Prize (honorable mention)

🏆 Independent Games Festival Nuovo Award (honorable mention)

🏆 Featured in New York's Museum of the Moving Image and Seattle's EMP Museum
